FunctionNaming:ProvidersScreen.kt$@Composable private fun ProviderCard( p: Provider, busy: Boolean, onEdit: (Provider) -> Unit, onDelete: (String) -> Unit, // True when this card is rendered inside the SectionCard("Router") group. The section // header + violet container already say "this is the router", so the in-card Router // badge would be redundant there — it only shows for a router card rendered elsewhere. inRouterSection: Boolean = false, )
